workflow.name: Generate overdue lead follow-up Gmail drafts with Google Sheets and Gemini
workflow.description:
Automatically identifies overdue sales leads and generates personalized follow-up emails using AI.

## How it works

1. Runs every weekday
2. Reads leads from Google Sheets
3. Filters leads with no contact for 5+ days
4. Downloads last meeting transcript from Google Drive
5. Uses Google Gemini to write a personalized email
6. Saves the email as a Gmail Draft for review
7. Updates lead status in the Sheet

## Setup

- Google Sheets with columns: Current Status, Last Contact, Name, Company, Email, Meeting Transcript, Sales Rep
- Google Drive access for transcript files
- Google Gemini API key (free from Google AI Studio)
- Gmail account
- Slack workspace

## Supported file types

- PDF
- TXT

## Notes

- Emails are saved as **drafts only** — not sent automatically
- Supported lead statuses: New
- Skips leads with status: Draft Created, Sent, Closed

## Inspiration

This workflow was built to solve a real problem at an educational institute.
The sales team needed someone to remind them about follow-ups and draft personalized emails — but hiring a personal assistant wasn't financially feasible.

Based on that, this system acts as that assistant: it tracks overdue leads, reads meeting transcripts, and writes personalized follow-up emails automatically.

I kept this stack free where possible — using Google Gemini's free tier for AI. 
For small sales teams, I believe the daily token limits are more than sufficient, making this a zero-cost automation.

workflow.name: Leads Follow-Up - Auto Draft Generator Published

parameters.text:
=You are a sales assistant. Read the following meeting transcript and write a personalized follow-up email based ONLY on the details below. Do not invent or assume any information not provided.

Lead details:
- Name: {{ $json.lead_name }}
- Company: {{ $json.lead_company }}
- Sales Rep: {{ $json.lead_sales_rep }}

Meeting Transcript:
{{ $json.transcript_text }}

Rules:
- Read the transcript carefully
- Extract the main topic discussed
- Extract the pain point mentioned
- Extract any agreed next steps
- Write a follow-up email of max 6 sentences
- Reference specific details from the transcript
- Do NOT use placeholders like [brackets]
- Return ONLY the email body, no subject line

nodes.name: HTTP - Download File from Google Drive

conditions.leftValue: ={{ $json['Last Contact'] && !isNaN(new Date($json['Last Contact'])) ? Math.floor((new Date() - new Date($json['Last Contact'])) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) : -1 }}

parameters.content:
## 4. Deduplication
After draft is created, status updates to **Draft Created** so this lead won't trigger again tomorrow.

## Error Handling
Notify teams on slack for
- **Missing transcript**
- **Download failed**
- **Unsupported file type**

## 1. Read & Filter Leads

Runs every weekday at 9AM. Reads all leads from Google Sheet and filter rows by:
- **Status** = New  ––  **Skips:** Draft Created, Sent, Closed
- **No contact** for 5+ days
- **Transcript link** exists

## LEADS FOLLOW-UP WORKFLOW

This workflow automatically identifies leads that require follow-up and generates personalized emails using AI, saved as drafts for human review. The team is notified on Slack when a draft is ready.

- Runs every weekday morning
- Finds leads with no contact for 5+ days
- Downloads their meeting transcript
- Generates a personalized email with AI
- Saves it as a Gmail Draft

**Who is it for?**
Sales teams who need to follow up regularly with specific leads.

---

### Setup Steps
- [ ] Replace YOUR_SHEET_ID with your Google Sheet ID 
- [ ] Update the Google Sheet column names in the filter nodes to match your sheet
- [ ] Set up Google Gemini credentials for AI processing nodes
- [ ] Set up Slack credentials and update channel IDs in all alert nodes
- [ ] Connect your Gmail account to the Gmail nodes

### Customization
- You can extend supported file types to include voice notes (MP3) via Gemini transcription
- This workflow can be adapted for any follow-up use case: feedback collection, deadline reminders, onboarding check-ins, etc.

---

## Required Google Sheet Columns

| Column | Description |
|---|---|
| Current status | Lead status: New, Draft Created, Sent, Closed |
| Last Contact | Date of last contact with the lead |
| Name | Lead's full name |
| Company | Lead's company name |
| Email | Lead's email address |
| Meeting Transcript |    Google Drive link to the meeting doc |
| Sales Rep | Name of the sales rep handling this lead |
| FollowUp Draft Creation date | Auto-filled by workflow when draft is created |

## 2. Download, Route & Extract Meetings Docs
Downloads the meeting transcript from Google Drive and routes it by file type.

**Supported formats:**
- TXT 
- PDF 

**If unsupported format →** Slack alert sent to team

## 3. AI Email Generation

Uses Google Gemini to write a personalized follow-up email based on the transcript.
Saves the output as a **Gmail Draft** — not sent automatically.

main.node: HTTP - Download File from Google Drive

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.

data.details: The Code node allows you to execute JavaScript in your workflow.

The Filter node can be used to filter items based on a condition. If the condition is met, the item will be passed on to the next node. If the condition is not met, the item will be omitted. Conditions can be combined together by AND(meet all conditions), or OR(meet at least one condition).
